---
title: "SEMANA5_CREACION DE GRAFICOS DE BARRAS"
author: "DE LA CRUZ FLORES MARIA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

```{r}
#GRAFICOS DE BARRAS EN R
#CREAR DATOS

enfermedad <- c("Diabetes", "gastritis", "Asma", "Neumonía", "COVID-19", "tbc")
casos <- c(45, 60, 30, 25, 50, 20)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
# Crear gráfico de barras con color
barplot(casos,
        names.arg = enfermedad,
        col = c("red", "blue", "green", "orange", "purple", "brown"),
        main = "Casos Clínicos por Tipo de enfermedad",
        xlab = "enfermedad",
        ylab = "Número de Casos")
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
